title: Project Crowbar SMP
body:
![Project Crowbar Season 3](https://files.projectcrowbar.com/public/api/raw?file=%2F&hash=N3QgYt9k9aUTQ8Q519MjVQ)

Welcome to Project Crowbar!
Project Crowbar is a small Minecraft server that focuses on automation and magic. Powered by a self-hosted dedicated server with a incredible community.

How to join the server?
### ⚠️ You are required to have a Discord account to proceed.
There is a linking process before you can play on Project Crowbar. You can find a guide for it at https://projectcrowbar.com/wiki/mcdclink

## What does the server offer?
- Economy
- Friendly community
- Create mod
- Magic
- Aeronautics

## What does the Modpack include?
- Create Mod and it's addons, including AERONAUTICS
- Ars Nouveau for spells and magic
- Other automation and machine mods like Immersive Engineering
- Open Parties and Claims
- Optimization
- Computers from ComputerCraft, CC:Tweaked, and it's addons
- Variety of building blocks for different builds and decorations
- Media mods for content consumption in-game
- Client quality of life
- Client visuals
## Other features
- Customized menu (FancyMenu)
- Original music made by the Staff members of Project Crowbar

##### CurseForge mods used in this Modpack:
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)

```
Official Modpack from Project Crowbar
100% Selfhosted by Nikk since September 2025
```
